title: kengyilia dasyphylla
intro: Kengyilia dasyphylla, also known as the Dasyphyllous Wildrye, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Kengyilia dasyphylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
